package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for custom_validator_registration_inside_handler: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Per-request validator registration instead of startup-time validator wiring.
type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerModel
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "custom_validator_registration_inside_handler"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerService{repo: &CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    validator.New()
    v := validator.New()
    v.RegisterValidation("custom_status", func(fl validator.FieldLevel) bool {
        return fl.Field().String() == "active" || fl.Field().String() == "inactive"
    })
    request.Status = "pending"
    _ = request
    return nil
}
